children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: a .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: b .—Political Activities
children.text: The corporation, or a director or officer of the corporation as such, may not contribute to, support, or participate in any political activity or in any manner attempt to influence legislation.

children.heading: .—Loan
children.label: c .—Loan
children.text: The corporation may not make a loan to a director, officer, or employee of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Claim of Governmental Approval or Authority
children.label: d .—Claim of Governmental Approval or Authority
children.text: The corporation may not claim congressional approval, or the authority of the United States, for any activity of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: e .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of the State of New York.
